label: Prismwake Berth
description: Prismwake Berth serves as a private sleeping cell cut into one of The Sixfold Cask’s six structural facets, its walls formed from dark composite panels set on strict polyhedral seams. A recessed bunk of voidstone laminate lies beneath a narrow strip of calibrated glass, which casts the port’s disciplined bands of radiance as measured angles across the bedding. Luminous linework is sunk into the floor and headwall as a muted geometric script that doubles as lighting and boundary marks, preserving the tavern’s regulated hush. Storage is built flush into the facet ribs, leaving the chamber spare, vibration-damped, and precisely ordered.
